generated_oml:
instance GantryCranePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for research and educational digital twin experiments"
    base:contains CranePositionSensor, CraneVelocitySensor, CraneController, GantryCraneMechanicalStructure, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance GantryCraneMechanicalStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dedicated controller for lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program interface for transmitting crane state data to digital twin"
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for gantry crane system, connected via Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor for gantry crane system, connected via Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor, CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane operational state data including position and velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, AzureCloudEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLCraneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based model for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicControlEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for historical data storage and retrieval"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AzureCloudEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure cloud services for data management and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance KinematicControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kinematic model-based control enabler for precise movement computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for computing precise movements using kinematic models to control gantry crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalMovementAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storing operational data for historical analysis and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring and visualization of crane system states"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for comparing physical and digital twin states to ensure synchronization accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalMovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane movements based on kinematic calculations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical crane operation data for performance analysis"
]

instance RealTimeStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of gantry crane components for operational monitoring"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on synchronization accuracy between physical and digital twin states"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application utilizes trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service to issue movement commands via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Specific command formats, validation mechanisms, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization via context and container diagrams, utilizes containerization for deployment, and follows an ad-hoc implementation approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is employed for inter-service communication among digital twin components. TimescaleDB and Grafana are used for data storage and visualization, respectively. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to AutomationML standards for digital twin modeling and utilizes Microsoft Azure cloud services for pipeline implementation, ensuring compliance with industrial automation specifications."
]
